text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. Please review the mod guidelines in #mod-handbook and introduce yourself in #introductions. We're glad to have you!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. Please check out #mentor-resources and #mentorship-matching to get connected with community members who could use your guidance. So glad you're here!
Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. Head over to #events-team to get started and check the upcoming event calendar. Excited to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a Member. Feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and explore the channels. Don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!
